aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Tuya 3-gang wall switch**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp`  
   - **Driver**: `switch_3gang`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Tuya 3-gang wall switch](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1353)  
   - **Status**: Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
1. **_TZ3000_mrpevh8p**  
   - **Drivers**: `button_wireless_1`  
2. **_TZ3000_xr7itfxq**  
   - **Drivers**: `button_wireless_2`  
3. **_TZ3000_zgyzgdua**  
   - **Drivers**: `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`  
   - **Issue**: [Auto] 3 new fingerprints from forks](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/166)  
   - **Status**: Closed

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints identified from forks in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #10**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)  
   - **User**: Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **Status**: Closed, not merged

2. **PR #45**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)  
   - **User**: vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **Status**: Closed, merged

3. **PR #46**: [Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)  
   - **User**: vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **Status**: Closed, not merged

4. **PR #1166**: [Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)  
   - **User**: chernals  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`  
   - **Status**: Closed, not merged

5. **PR #1350**: [added TS110E driver for](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)  
   - **User**: PiTRiS87  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`  
   - **Status**: Open

6. **PR #1253**: [Added 3 new devices](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)  
   - **User**: Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **Status**: Open

7. **PR #1219**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)  
   - **User**: Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`  
   - **Status**: Open

8. **PR #1218**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)  
   - **User**: Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE204_dapwryy7`  
   - **Status**: Open

9. **PR #1195**: [Add "_TZE204_bjzrowv2" - Update app.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)  
   - **User**: YuriEstevan

   - **Status**: Open

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting new device requests, existing fingerprint support, and relevant pull requests.
